lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਮ ਮੁਏ ਜੀਵੇ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur satigur naam drirraaeo har har ham mue jeeve har japibhaa |
lines.english: The Guru, the True Guru, has implanted the Naam, the Name of the Lord within me. I was dead, but chanting the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, I have been brought back to life.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਗੁਰੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਬਿਖੁ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਬਾਹ ਦੇਇ ਕਢਿਭਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan guroo gur satigur pooraa bikh ddubade baah dee kadtibhaa |1|
lines.english: Blessed, blessed is the Guru, the Guru, the Perfect True Guru; He reached out to me with His Arm, and pulled me up and out of the ocean of poison. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਪਜੰਪਿ ਉਪਾਇ ਨ ਪਾਈਐ ਕਤਹੂ ਗੁਰਿ ਪੂਰੈ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਾਭਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aupajanp upaae na paaeeai katahoo gur poorai har prabh laabhaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: God is never found, even by making all sorts of new efforts. The Lord God is obtained only through the Perfect Guru. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਰਧਾਂਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: jap man raam naam aradhaanbhaa |
lines.english: O mind, meditate and worship the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੋਹ ਮਨੂਰ ਕੰਚਨੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਉਰ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਹਰਿਭਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: loh manoor kanchan mil sangat har ur dhaario gur haribhaa |2|
lines.english: Even iron slag is transformed into gold, joining the Lord's Congregation. Through the Guru, the Lord's Light is enshrined within the heart. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸੁ ਰਾਮ ਰਸਾਇਣੁ ਰਸੁ ਪੀਆ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਰਸਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam ras raam rasaaein ras peea guramat rasabhaa |
lines.english: The Sublime Essence of the Lord's Name is the source of nectar and bliss; drinking in this Sublime Essence, following the Guru's Teachings, I have become happy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਨਿਤ ਲੋਭਿ ਲੁਭਾਨੇ ਪੁਤ ਕਲਤ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੁਭਿਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: haumai bikhiaa nit lobh lubhaane put kalat mohi lubhibhaa |
lines.english: Those who are continually lured by greed, egotism and corruption, who are lured away by emotional attachment to their children and spouse

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਮਰੇ ਗੁਨ ਤੁਮ ਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਹਮ ਪਰੇ ਹਾਰਿ ਤੁਮ ਸਰਨਭਾ ॥
lines.translit: tumare gun tum hee prabh jaanahu ham pare haar tum saranabhaa |
lines.english: O God, You alone know Your Glorious Virtues; I have grown weary - I seek Your Sanctuary.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਪਗ ਸੰਤ ਨ ਸੇਵੇ ਕਬਹੂ ਤੇ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭੂੰਭਰ ਭਰਭਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tin pag sant na seve kabahoo te manamukh bhoonbhar bharabhaa |3|
lines.english: - they never serve at the feet of the Saints; those self-willed manmukhs are filled with ashes. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਬਿਭਾਸ ਪੜਤਾਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee bibhaas parrataal mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Bibhaas, Partaal, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਾਨਹੁ ਤਿਉ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਦਾਸੁ ਤੁਮਨਭਾ ॥੪॥੬॥ ਛਕਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: jiau jaanahu tiau raakhahu suaamee jan naanak daas tumanabhaa |4|6| chhakaa 1 |
lines.english: As You know best, You preserve and protect me, O my Lord and Master; servant Nanak is Your slave. ||4||6|| First Set of Six||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: har daragah paaveh maan |
lines.english: You shall be honored in the Court of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਤੇ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰਾਨ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jin japiaa te paar paraan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Those who chant and meditate shall be carried across to the other shore. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਧਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: jap man har har naam nidhaan |
lines.english: O mind, meditate on the Treasure of the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਅਠਸਠਿ ਮਜਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun man har keerat atthasatth majaan |
lines.english: Listen, O mind: the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises is equal to bathing at the sixty-eight sacred shrines of pilgrimage.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਮਾਨੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sun man guramukh paaveh maan |1|
lines.english: Listen, O mind: as Gurmukh, you shall be blessed with honor. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਨਿ ਮਨ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: sun man har har naam kar dhiaan |
lines.english: Listen, O mind: meditate on the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਵਾਨ ॥੨॥੧॥੭॥
lines.translit: mil naanak har bhagavaan |2|1|7|
lines.english: O Nanak, you shall meet with the Lord God. ||2||1||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਮਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰੁ ਪਰਧਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jap man paramesur paradhaan |
lines.english: O mind, chant and meditate on the Supreme Transcendent Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਖੋਵੈ ਪਾਪ ਕੋਟਾਨ ॥
lines.translit: khin khovai paap kottaan |
lines.english: Millions of sins shall be destroyed in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਾਤੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ਬਿਭਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: prabhaatee mahalaa 5 bibhaas |
lines.english: Prabhaatee, Fifth Mehl, Bibhaas:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੰਚ ਤਤ ਰਚਿ ਜੋਤਿ ਨਿਵਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: panch tat rach jot nivaajiaa |
lines.english: From the five elements, He formed it, and infused His Light within it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਤਨੁ ਸਭੁ ਸਾਜਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: man har keea tan sabh saajiaa |
lines.english: The Lord created the mind, and fashioned the entire body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਿਹਜਾ ਧਰਤਿ ਬਰਤਨ ਕਉ ਪਾਨੀ ॥
lines.translit: sihajaa dharat baratan kau paanee |
lines.english: He made the earth its bed, and water for it to use.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਮਖ ਨ ਵਿਸਾਰਹੁ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਸਾਰਿਗਪਾਨੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nimakh na visaarahu sevahu saarigapaanee |1|
lines.english: Do not forget Him for an instant; serve the Lord of the World. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖ ਸੋਗ ਤੇ ਰਹਹਿ ਨਿਰਾਰਾ ਤਾਂ ਤੂ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਾਨਪਤੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog te raheh niraaraa taan too paaveh praanapate |1| rahaau |
lines.english: If you remain unattached and unaffected by sorrow and joy, then you shall find the Lord of Life. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਿ ਹੋਇ ਪਰਮ ਗਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: man satigur sev hoe param gate |
lines.english: O mind, serve the True Guru, and obtain the supreme status.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਪੜ ਭੋਗ ਰਸ ਅਨਿਕ ਭੁੰਚਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: kaaparr bhog ras anik bhunchaae |
lines.english: He makes all the various pleasures, clothes and foods for you to enjoy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਤ ਪਿਤਾ ਕੁਟੰਬ ਸਗਲ ਬਨਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: maat pitaa kuttanb sagal banaae |
lines.english: He made your mother, father and all relatives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਵਹੁ ਨੀਤਾ ਨੀਤ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: so har sevahu neetaa neet |2|
lines.english: So serve the Lord, forever and ever. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਿਜਕੁ ਸਮਾਹੇ ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: rijak samaahe jal thal meet |
lines.english: He provides sustenance to all, in the water and on the land, O friend.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਹਾ ਸਖਾਈ ਜਹ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: tahaa sakhaaee jeh koe na hovai |
lines.english: He shall be your Helper and Support there, where no one else can help you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੈ ਨਹੀ ਪਛੋੁਤਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: daat karai nahee pachhoutaavai |
lines.english: He bestows His Gifts, and never regrets them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਅਪ੍ਰਾਧ ਇਕ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਧੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: kott apraadh ik khin meh dhovai |
lines.english: He washes away millions of sins in an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕਾ ਬਖਸ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਹੁਰਿ ਨ ਬੁਲਾਵੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ekaa bakhas fir bahur na bulaavai |3|
lines.english: He forgives, once and for all, and never asks for one's account again. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਪੁ ਧਰਿਓ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਮਹਿ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕੁ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਇਕਫਾ ॥੪॥੫॥
lines.translit: har har aap dhario har jan meh jan naanak har prabh ikafaa |4|5|
lines.english: The Lord, Har, Har, has enshrined Himself within His humble servant. O Nanak, the Lord God and His servant are one and the same. ||4||5||
